title: Lab candidate: /ftp/ directory listing exposed on Juice Shop
summary: Nikto and bounded metadata-only verification identified /ftp/ as a real directory listing route. robots.txt disallows /ftp. This remains lab-only candidate evidence, not a real-program confirmed finding.
remediation: Disable public directory listings and remove internal artifacts from public web roots. For this lab, confirm the exposure is intentional Juice Shop training behavior.
verification_guidance: Manual lab-only verification: confirm /ftp/ returns a directory index, record filenames/sizes only, do not recursively download, and do not handle secrets/loot.

title: Lab candidate: multiple recommended security headers missing on Juice Shop root
summary: Headers audit observed missing CSP, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, COOP, COEP, and HSTS while X-Content-Type-Options and X-Frame-Options were present. This is informational unless chained to concrete impact.
remediation: Add context-appropriate browser security headers. Enable HSTS only after HTTPS is correctly deployed.
verification_guidance: Review headers across representative paths and only escalate if the missing header enables a demonstrated impact chain.
